<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Saffron Education — UCAS &amp; Singapore Admissions Consultancy</title>
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Fraunces:opsz,wght@9..144,400;9..144,500;9..144,600;9..144,700&family=Plus+Jakarta+Sans:wght@400;500;600;700;800&family=IBM+Plex+Mono:wght@400;500;600&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
  :root{
    --ink:#2b0d12;
    --burgundy:#3d0f1a;
    --burgundy-deep:#2a0a13;
    --maroon:#9c2138;
    --maroon-bright:#c22c47;
    --gold:#e0921f;
    --gold-soft:#f0b961;
    --ember:#c2461f;
    --parchment:#f4ecdc;
    --parchment-dim:#ece2cc;
    --navy:#1b2436;
    --line: rgba(240,225,190,0.18);
  }
  *{box-sizing:border-box;}
  html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
  body{
    margin:0;
    background:var(--burgundy);
    color:var(--parchment);
    font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans', sans-serif;
    -webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;
  }
  img{max-width:100%;display:block;}
  a{color:inherit;}

  .wrap{max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 32px;}

  h1,h2,h3{
    font-family:'Fraunces', serif;
    font-weight:600;
    margin:0;
    letter-spacing:-0.01em;
  }

  .eyebrow{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono', monospace;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    letter-spacing:0.14em;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--gold-soft);
    display:flex;
    align-items:center;
    gap:10px;
  }
  .eyebrow::before{
    content:"";
    width:18px;height:1px;
    background:var(--gold-soft);
    display:inline-block;
  }

  /* ---------- NAV ---------- */
  header{
    position:sticky; top:0; z-index:50;
    background:rgba(42,10,19,0.86);
    backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
  }
  nav{
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    padding:16px 32px;
    max-width:1180px;margin:0 auto;
  }
  .brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
  .brand img{height:34px;width:auto;}
  .navlinks{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:34px;font-size:14.5px;font-weight:500;}
  .navlinks a{text-decoration:none;color:var(--parchment-dim);transition:color .15s;}
  .navlinks a:hover{color:var(--gold-soft);}
  .btn{
    font-family:'Plus Jakarta Sans',sans-serif;
    font-weight:700;
    font-size:14px;
    border:none;
    cursor:pointer;
    text-decoration:none;
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    transition:transform .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease, background .15s ease;
  }
  .btn-gold{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--gold-soft),var(--gold));
    color:#2a0a13;
    padding:12px 22px;
    border-radius:3px;
  }
  .btn-gold:hover{transform:translateY(-1px);box-shadow:0 8px 20px rgba(224,146,31,0.35);}
  .btn-outline{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    color:var(--parchment);
    padding:11px 20px;
    border-radius:3px;
    background:transparent;
  }
  .btn-outline:hover{border-color:var(--gold-soft); color:var(--gold-soft);}
  .nav-cta{display:none;}
  @media(min-width:720px){ .nav-cta{display:inline-flex;} }
  .navlinks{display:none;}
  @media(min-width:880px){ .navlinks{display:flex;} }

  /* ---------- HERO ---------- */
  .hero{
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
    padding:84px 0 70px;
  }
  .hero::before{
    content:"";
    position:absolute; inset:0;
    background:
      radial-gradient(ellipse 700px 420px at 14% -10%, rgba(224,146,31,0.16), transparent 60%),
      radial-gradient(ellipse 600px 500px at 100% 30%, rgba(194,44,71,0.18), transparent 60%);
    pointer-events:none;
  }
  .hero-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:48px;
    align-items:center;
    position:relative;
  }
  @media(min-width:900px){
    .hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1.15fr 0.85fr;}
  }
  .hero h1{
    font-size:clamp(36px,5.6vw,60px);
    line-height:1.04;
    color:var(--parchment);
    margin:18px 0 22px;
  }
  .hero h1 em{
    font-style:italic;
    color:var(--gold-soft);
  }
  .hero p.lead{
    font-size:17.5px;
    line-height:1.6;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.82);
    max-width:480px;
    margin:0 0 30px;
  }
  .hero-actions{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:14px;margin-bottom:34px;}
  .hero-note{
    font-size:13px;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.55);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
  }

  .hero-photo-wrap{
    position:relative;
  }
  .photo-card{
    position:relative;
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:4px;
    padding:10px;
    background:rgba(244,236,220,0.03);
  }
  .photo-card img{
    width:100%;
    border-radius:2px;
    filter:saturate(1.02) contrast(1.02);
    display:block;
  }
  .photo-caption{
    display:flex;
    justify-content:space-between;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:11px;
    letter-spacing:0.04em;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.5);
    padding:10px 4px 2px;
  }
  .marginalia{
    position:absolute;
    background:var(--parchment);
    color:var(--burgundy-deep);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12px;
    font-weight:500;
    padding:9px 13px;
    border-radius:2px;
    box-shadow:0 14px 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.35);
    line-height:1.4;
    max-width:172px;
  }
  .marginalia .tick{color:var(--ember);font-weight:700;margin-right:4px;}
  .marg-1{
    top:-18px; left:-26px;
    transform:rotate(-4deg);
  }
  .marg-2{
    bottom:18px; right:-30px;
    transform:rotate(3deg);
  }
  @media(max-width:600px){
    .marg-1, .marg-2{display:none;}
  }

  /* ---------- TRUST STRIP ---------- */
  .trust{
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:26px 0;
  }
  .trust .wrap{
    display:flex;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    gap:14px 38px;
    align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;
  }
  .trust-label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12px;
    letter-spacing:0.06em;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.5);
    white-space:nowrap;
  }
  .trust-names{
    display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:28px 38px;
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-size:17px;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.78);
  }
  .trust-names span{white-space:nowrap;}

  /* ---------- SECTION GENERIC ---------- */
  section{padding:88px 0;}
  .section-head{
    max-width:640px;
    margin-bottom:52px;
  }
  .section-head h2{
    font-size:clamp(28px,3.6vw,40px);
    color:var(--parchment);
    margin-top:16px;
    line-height:1.12;
  }
  .section-head p{
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.72);
    font-size:16px;
    line-height:1.6;
    margin-top:14px;
  }

  /* ---------- OFFER (exam paper sections) ---------- */
  .paper{
    background:var(--parchment);
    color:var(--ink);
    border-radius:6px;
  }
  .paper-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:1px;
    background:rgba(43,13,18,0.1);
    border-radius:6px;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  @media(min-width:780px){
    .paper-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  }
  .paper-col{
    background:var(--parchment);
    padding:40px 38px 42px;
  }
  .paper-col-tag{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12px;
    letter-spacing:0.1em;
    color:var(--ember);
    text-transform:uppercase;
    margin-bottom:10px;
    display:block;
  }
  .paper-col h3{
    font-size:25px;
    color:var(--burgundy-deep);
    margin-bottom:6px;
  }
  .paper-col .sub{
    font-size:14px;
    color:#6b5a4a;
    margin-bottom:22px;
  }
  .paper-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;}
  .paper-list li{
    display:flex;
    align-items:baseline;
    gap:12px;
    padding:13px 0;
    border-top:1px solid rgba(43,13,18,0.12);
    font-size:15.5px;
    color:#3a2c22;
  }
  .paper-list li:first-child{border-top:none;}
  .paper-list .num{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:#9c8266;
    flex-shrink:0;
    padding-top:2px;
  }

  /* ---------- SERVICES ---------- */
  .services-grid{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:22px;
  }
  @media(min-width:780px){
    .services-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);}
  }
  .svc-card{
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:6px;
    padding:32px 28px;
    background:linear-gradient(160deg, rgba(244,236,220,0.04), rgba(244,236,220,0.01));
    transition:border-color .15s, transform .15s;
  }
  .svc-card:hover{border-color:rgba(224,146,31,0.45); transform:translateY(-2px);}
  .svc-icon{
    width:44px;height:44px;
    margin-bottom:22px;
    color:var(--gold-soft);
  }
  .svc-card h3{
    font-size:19px;
    color:var(--parchment);
    margin-bottom:10px;
    font-weight:600;
  }
  .svc-card p{
    font-size:14.5px;
    line-height:1.6;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.68);
    margin:0;
  }

  /* ---------- FEATURED PROGRAMME ---------- */
  .feature{
    border:1px solid rgba(224,146,31,0.35);
    border-radius:8px;
    padding:46px;
    position:relative;
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(224,146,31,0.07), rgba(194,44,71,0.05));
    display:grid;
    gap:36px;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
  }
  @media(min-width:860px){
    .feature{grid-template-columns:1.1fr 0.9fr; padding:54px;}
  }
  .ribbon{
    position:absolute;
    top:-14px; left:40px;
    background:var(--ember);
    color:var(--parchment);
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:11.5px;
    letter-spacing:0.08em;
    text-transform:uppercase;
    padding:7px 16px;
    border-radius:2px;
    box-shadow:0 8px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.3);
  }
  .feature h3{
    font-size:30px;
    color:var(--parchment);
    margin:6px 0 14px;
  }
  .feature p.desc{
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.75);
    font-size:15.5px;
    line-height:1.6;
    margin-bottom:24px;
  }
  .feature-unis{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:12.5px;
    color:var(--gold-soft);
    letter-spacing:0.03em;
    line-height:1.9;
  }
  .check-list{list-style:none;margin:0;padding:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:14px;}
  .check-list li{
    display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:flex-start;
    font-size:15px;color:rgba(244,236,220,0.86);
    line-height:1.5;
  }
  .check-list svg{flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;color:var(--gold-soft);}

  /* ---------- WHO WE ARE ---------- */
  .who{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:1fr;
    gap:48px;
    align-items:center;
  }
  @media(min-width:860px){
    .who{grid-template-columns:0.9fr 1.1fr;}
  }
  .stat-row{
    display:grid;
    grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);
    gap:1px;
    background:var(--line);
    border:1px solid var(--line);
    border-radius:6px;
    overflow:hidden;
    margin-top:30px;
  }
  .stat-cell{
    background:var(--burgundy);
    padding:22px 20px;
  }
  .stat-cell .label{
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:11.5px;
    letter-spacing:0.05em;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.5);
    text-transform:uppercase;
  }
  .stat-cell .val{
    font-family:'Fraunces',serif;
    font-size:21px;
    color:var(--gold-soft);
    margin-top:6px;
  }

  /* ---------- CONTACT / CTA ---------- */
  .cta-band{
    background:linear-gradient(135deg, var(--maroon) 0%, var(--burgundy-deep) 100%);
    border-radius:10px;
    padding:60px 48px;
    text-align:center;
    position:relative;
    overflow:hidden;
  }
  .cta-band::after{
    content:"";
    position:absolute;
    inset:0;
    background:radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%, rgba(224,146,31,0.18), transparent 55%);
  }
  .cta-band h2{
    font-size:clamp(28px,4vw,40px);
    color:var(--parchment);
    position:relative;
  }
  .cta-band p{
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.78);
    font-size:16px;
    margin:16px auto 30px;
    max-width:480px;
    position:relative;
  }
  .cta-actions{
    display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:16px;flex-wrap:wrap;
    position:relative;
  }
  .contact-line{
    margin-top:30px;
    font-family:'IBM Plex Mono',monospace;
    font-size:13.5px;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.6);
    display:flex;justify-content:center;gap:26px;flex-wrap:wrap;
    position:relative;
  }
  .contact-line a{text-decoration:none;}
  .contact-line a:hover{color:var(--gold-soft);}

  /* ---------- FOOTER ---------- */
  footer{
    border-top:1px solid var(--line);
    padding:40px 0 50px;
  }
  .foot-row{
    display:flex;
    flex-wrap:wrap;
    justify-content:space-between;
    align-items:center;
    gap:20px;
  }
  .foot-brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
  .foot-brand img{height:26px;}
  .foot-meta{
    font-size:13px;
    color:rgba(244,236,220,0.45);
  }

  ::selection{background:var(--gold); color:var(--burgundy-deep);}

  @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){
    *{transition:none !important;}
  }
</style>
</head>
<body>

<header>
  <nav>
    <a href="#top" class="brand"><img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Saffron Education"></a>
    <div class="navlinks">
      <a href="#offer">Programmes</a>
      <a href="#services">Services</a>
      <a href="#tmua">TMUA 2026</a>
      <a href="#who">About</a>
      <a href="#contact">Contact</a>
    </div>
    <a class="btn btn-gold nav-cta" href="https://tinyurl.com/b54cfhcz" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book free consultation</a>
  </nav>
</header>

<main id="top">

  <!-- HERO -->
  <section class="hero" style="padding-top:64px;">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="hero-grid">
        <div>
          <div class="eyebrow">ADMISSIONS CONSULTANCY — UK &amp; SINGAPORE</div>
          <h1>Write the application<br>only <em>you</em> could write.</h1>
          <p class="lead">Personalised UCAS and Singapore admissions support from people who hold offers from Oxford, Cambridge, Imperial, and Singapore's medical schools — not from a script.</p>
          <div class="hero-actions">
            <a class="btn btn-gold" href="https://tinyurl.com/b54cfhcz" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book a free consultation</a>
            <a class="btn btn-outline" href="#offer">See what we cover</a>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-note">Premium, personalised packages — made affordable to all.</div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-photo-wrap">
          <div class="photo-card">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Graduates in academic gowns outside King's College, Cambridge">
            <div class="photo-caption">
              <span>King's College, Cambridge</span>
              <span>Graduation day</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="marginalia marg-1"><span class="tick">✓</span>strong opening — admissions tutors notice this</div>
          <div class="marginalia marg-2"><span class="tick">✓</span>specific, evidenced, yours</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- TRUST STRIP -->
  <div class="trust">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="trust-label">RUN BY OFFER HOLDERS FROM</div>
      <div class="trust-names">
        <span>Cambridge</span><span>Oxford</span><span>Imperial College London</span><span>LSE</span><span>NUS Medicine</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- WHAT WE OFFER -->
  <section id="offer">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div class="eyebrow">WHAT WE COVER</div>
        <h2>Two application systems. One standard.</h2>
        <p>We work across UCAS applications for UK universities and admissions test preparation for Singapore's most competitive courses — at every stage, from first draft to final interview.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="paper">
        <div class="paper-grid">
          <div class="paper-col">
            <span class="paper-col-tag">Section A</span>
            <h3>United Kingdom</h3>
            <div class="sub">UCAS admissions, all stages</div>
            <ul class="paper-list">
              <li><span class="num">01</span><span>Computer Science</span></li>
              <li><span class="num">02</span><span>Economics</span></li>
              <li><span class="num">03</span><span>Natural Sciences</span></li>
            </ul>
          </div>
          <div class="paper-col">
            <span class="paper-col-tag">Section B</span>
            <h3>Singapore</h3>
            <div class="sub">Medicine and health sciences admissions</div>
            <ul class="paper-list">
              <li><span class="num">01</span><span>UCAT preparation</span></li>
              <li><span class="num">02</span><span>Interview readiness</span></li>
              <li><span class="num">03</span><span>Application strategy</span></li>
            </ul>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- SERVICES -->
  <section id="services">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="section-head">
        <div class="eyebrow">HOW WE HELP</div>
        <h2>Three places most applications lose marks.</h2>
        <p>Each is run one-to-one with someone who sat the same test or wrote the same statement within the last few years — not a generic template.</p>
      </div>

      <div class="services-grid">
        <div class="svc-card">
          <svg class="svc-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M14 34 L30 10 L38 16 L22 40 L13 41 Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            <path d="M26 14 L34 20" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
            <path d="M8 41 H40" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
          </svg>
          <h3>Personal statement</h3>
          <p>Structured, line-by-line guidance from drafting through to a final version that reads like one applicant — not a committee.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="svc-card">
          <svg class="svc-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <rect x="10" y="7" width="28" height="34" rx="1.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6"/>
            <path d="M16 16 H32 M16 23 H32 M16 30 H26" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linecap="round"/>
            <path d="M30 28 L33.5 31.5 L40 24" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.8" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
          </svg>
          <h3>Admission test prep</h3>
          <p>Targeted training for TMUA, ESAT and UCAT — question banks, technique breakdowns, and timed practice under real conditions.</p>
        </div>
        <div class="svc-card">
          <svg class="svc-icon" viewBox="0 0 48 48" fill="none" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
            <path d="M8 14 H40 V32 H22 L14 39 V32 H8 Z" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.6" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
            <circle cx="17" cy="23" r="1.6" fill="currentColor"/>
            <circle cx="24" cy="23" r="1.6" fill="currentColor"/>
            <circle cx="31" cy="23" r="1.6" fill="currentColor"/>
          </svg>
          <h3>Interview preparation</h3>
          <p>Mock interviews modelled on real UK admissions and Singapore med-school formats, with direct feedback after every round.</p>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- FEATURED: TMUA -->
  <section id="tmua">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="feature">
        <span class="ribbon">Enrolling now</span>
        <div>
          <div class="eyebrow">FEATURED PROGRAMME</div>
          <h3>TMUA 2026<br>Online Preparation</h3>
          <p class="desc">TMUA is the official admissions test for Computer Science, Mathematics and Economics courses at Cambridge, Oxford, Imperial, and LSE. This programme builds the technique, not just the practice volume.</p>
          <div class="feature-unis">
            CAMBRIDGE — Computer Science, Economics, Mathematics<br>
            OXFORD — Computer Science, Mathematics<br>
            IMPERIAL — Computer Science, Mathematics, Economics, Finance &amp; Data Science<br>
            LSE — Economics
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <ul class="check-list">
            <li><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><path d="M3 9.5 L7 13.5 L15 4.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
              Comprehensive question bank, built on the most recent syllabus</li>
            <li><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><path d="M3 9.5 L7 13.5 L15 4.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
              Question breakdowns focused on technique, not just answers</li>
            <li><svg width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 18 18" fill="none"><path d="M3 9.5 L7 13.5 L15 4.5" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/></svg>
              Personalised training with targeted, ongoing support</li>
          </ul>
          <a class="btn btn-gold" style="margin-top:28px;" href="https://tinyurl.com/b54cfhcz" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Reserve a place</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- WHO WE ARE -->
  <section id="who">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="who">
        <div>
          <div class="eyebrow">WHO WE ARE</div>
          <h2 style="font-size:clamp(26px,3.4vw,36px); margin-top:16px; line-height:1.15;">Taught by people who got the offer.</h2>
          <p style="color:rgba(244,236,220,0.72); font-size:15.5px; line-height:1.65; margin-top:16px;">
            Saffron Education is run by offer holders from top UK universities and Singapore's medical schools. We know the syllabus changes, the marking schemes, and what an admissions tutor is actually reading for — because we read for it ourselves, recently.
          </p>
          <div class="stat-row">
            <div class="stat-cell">
              <div class="label">Markets covered</div>
              <div class="val">UK &amp; Singapore</div>
            </div>
            <div class="stat-cell">
              <div class="label">Languages</div>
              <div class="val">English &amp; 中文</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div>
          <div class="photo-card" style="transform:rotate(0.4deg);">
            <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Graduates outside King's College Chapel, Cambridge">
            <div class="photo-caption">
              <span>Cambridge</span>
              <span>Class of offer holders</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

  <!-- CONTACT -->
  <section id="contact">
    <div class="wrap">
      <div class="cta-band">
        <div class="eyebrow" style="justify-content:center;">BOOK A FREE CONSULTATION</div>
        <h2>Ready to start your application?</h2>
        <p>Tell us where you're applying and what you've got so far — we'll map out exactly where the time is best spent.</p>
        <div class="cta-actions">
          <a class="btn btn-gold" href="https://tinyurl.com/b54cfhcz" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Book your free consultation</a>
          <a class="btn btn-outline" href="mailto:saffroneducation26@gmail.com">Email us instead</a>
        </div>
        <div class="contact-line">
          <a href="mailto:saffroneducation26@gmail.com">saffroneducation26@gmail.com</a>
          <a href="tel:+6591474518">+65 9147 4518</a>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </section>

</main>

<footer>
  <div class="wrap foot-row">
    <div class="foot-brand">
      <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Saffron Education mark">
      <span style="font-family:'Fraunces',serif; font-size:16px; color:rgba(244,236,220,0.85);">Saffron Education</span>
    </div>
    <div class="foot-meta">UK &amp; Singapore admissions consultancy · saffroneducation26@gmail.com · +65 9147 4518</div>
  </div>
</footer>

</body>
</html>
